notes: Basic Galaga mechanics are present (shooting, enemies, diving, scoring) but the entering animation is broken (all enemies share same position logic), no capture mechanic works, sprites are plain colored squares with no Galaga-like appearance, and the starfield is static-looking rather than scrolling properly.
Basic space shooter with colored squares instead of sprites; includes dead code for dual ships but lacks the tractor beam mechanic, and diving enemies jarringly teleport back to formation.

Playable but very incomplete as Galaga: enemies are simple rectangles with broken synchronized entry behavior, no proper formations/capture/challenge mechanics, and overall it feels like a crude shooter rather than an authentic Galaga build.
